title: PI AGENT FULL COURSE: Master Pi Agent in 30 Minutes
summary: A tutorial course teaching Pi Agent, a framework for building real coding agents. The course is designed as a 30-minute introduction and is accompanied by a longer structured course on the creator's website.
writeup: This video is a 30-minute introductory tutorial on Pi Agent, a framework for building coding agents. It covers the basics of working with the framework and touches on AI agents and multi-agent systems. The course matters for anyone evaluating tools for building real coding agents, and it serves as an on-ramp to a longer structured course on the creator's website.
